landing.subtitle: Build professional resumes with real-time preview, 7 templates, and one-click PDF export in multiple languages. No paywall, no sign-up, no data stored on servers. 100% free and open source.
landing.featuresHeading: No Catch. No Paywall. Just Tools.
landing.previewDesc: See every change instantly as you type. Our dual-pane editor shows your final PDF in real time — no surprises at export.
landing.exportDesc: One-click PDF export in multiple languages — no account, no payment, no limits. ATS-friendly formatting with clean metadata, every time.
landing.reorderDesc: Drag and drop to reorder your resume sections. Tailor the layout for each role you're applying to, no copy-pasting required.
landing.templatesHeading: Pick a Style. Export for Free.
landing.templatesDesc: All 7 templates are ATS-friendly, fully customizable, and free to export, no premium tier, no watermarks.
landing.ctaDesc: No sign-up required. Your data stays in your browser. Build, export, and land the job, without paying a cent.
landing.linkedInNotConfigured: LinkedIn import is not configured yet. Add LinkedIn OAuth env values.
landing.linkedInUnavailable: LinkedIn sign-in is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
landing.faqWhatIsA: MyPDFCV is a free, open-source resume builder that runs entirely in your browser. Create professional, ATS-friendly resumes with real-time preview and export them as PDF — no account required.
landing.faqFreeA: Yes, 100% free with no hidden costs, no premium tier, and no watermarks. Every feature, template, and export is available to everyone at no charge.
landing.faqTemplatesA: We offer 7 professionally designed templates, all ATS-friendly and fully customizable. Each template can be tailored to match your personal style and industry.
landing.faqPrivacyA: Your resume data never leaves your browser — everything is stored locally on your device. We only collect anonymous usage analytics to understand how the platform is used and improve the experience. We never access, store, or sell your personal resume content.
landing.faqExportA: You can export your resume as a high-quality PDF with one click. The output uses clean metadata and ATS-friendly formatting to ensure your resume passes automated screening systems.
landing.faqCustomizationA: Absolutely. You can reorder sections via drag-and-drop, adjust content, and choose from 7 templates. The editor supports multiple languages, so you can build resumes in any of our 7 supported locales.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1: MyPDFCV is a client-side application. All resume data you create is stored exclusively in your browser's localStorage. We do not collect, transmit, or store your resume data on any server. We do collect anonymous usage analytics via PostHog (see section 8).
privacy.s2: If you choose to sign in with LinkedIn, we access only the following information through LinkedIn's OAuth API: your name, email address, headline, location, and profile photo. This data is used solely to pre-fill your resume and is stored only in your browser's localStorage. We do not retain your LinkedIn access token beyond the active session.
privacy.s3: Our AI-powered text improvement feature runs entirely in your browser using open-source models (Xenova/flan-t5-small) via WebAssembly. No resume content is sent to external servers for AI processing. The AI model is downloaded once and cached locally in your browser.
privacy.s4: When you import a PDF or DOCX file, the document is processed entirely in your browser. We do not upload, transmit, or store your uploaded documents on any server. The file is read into memory, text is extracted to populate your resume fields, and the original file data is immediately discarded. No copy of your uploaded document is retained.
privacy.s5intro: If you are located in the European Union or European Economic Area, the following applies under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
s5items: Data controller: Wesley Ramalho. For inquiries, visit www.wesleyramalho.com/contact.
Legal basis: Consent. You choose to use the service and provide information voluntarily.
Data processed: Only the resume content you type or import. All data is stored in your browser's localStorage and is not transmitted to our servers.

No cross-border transfers of personal data: Your resume data is not transferred to any server. Anonymous usage analytics are sent to PostHog's servers in the United States but contain no personally identifiable information. The optional LinkedIn OAuth flow is governed by LinkedIn's own privacy policy.

Your rights: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, object to processing, and port your data. Since all data is stored locally in your browser, you can export as PDF (access & portability), edit directly (rectification), or clear localStorage (erasure).
No automated decision-making: We do not use your data for automated decision-making or profiling. The AI text improvement feature generates suggestions that you manually review and accept or reject.
privacy.s6intro: If you are a California resident, the following applies under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):
s6items: We do not sell personal information. We do not share personal information with third parties for monetary or other valuable consideration.
We do not collect personal information on our servers. All resume data is stored in your browser's localStorage only. Anonymous usage analytics (no PII) are collected via PostHog.
Right to delete: You can delete all data at any time by clearing your browser's localStorage or removing individual resumes from the dashboard.
Right to know: The categories of information processed are limited to resume content you voluntarily create (name, contact details, work history, education, skills), stored locally only.
privacy.s7: This service is not directed at children under 13 years of age (COPPA) or under 16 years of age (GDPR). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. Since all data is stored locally in the user's browser and not transmitted to us, we have no means to identify the age of our users.
privacy.s8: We use PostHog, a product analytics service, to collect anonymous usage data such as which features are used, pages visited, and general interaction patterns. No personally identifiable information (names, emails, resume content) is included in analytics events. All analytics profiles are anonymous, your IP address is not stored, and we respect the Do Not Track (DNT) browser setting. Analytics data is sent to PostHog's servers in the United States. You can disable analytics by enabling Do Not Track in your browser settings. We use localStorage for saving your resume data, theme preference, and PostHog's anonymous session data. See our Cookie Policy for more details.
privacy.s9: For privacy-related inquiries, please visit www.wesleyramalho.com/contact.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1: By accessing and using MyPDFCV, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.s2: MyPDFCV is a free, client-side resume builder tool. All resume data is stored locally in your browser. We do not provide hosting, storage, or backup services for your resume data. We collect anonymous usage analytics via PostHog to improve the service. No resume content or personal information is included in analytics data.
terms.s3: The AI text improvement feature uses an open-source model (Xenova/flan-t5-small) that runs entirely in your browser via WebAssembly. No resume content is sent to external servers. AI suggestions are generated locally and are not stored or logged. The quality of suggestions depends on the model and input text. You are responsible for reviewing and editing all AI-generated content before using it.
terms.s4: The document import feature processes PDF and DOCX files entirely in your browser. Uploaded files are read into memory for text extraction and immediately discarded. We do not upload, transmit, or store your documents. Text extraction quality varies depending on the document format and structure.
terms.s5: MyPDFCV is built with open-source software. The following key libraries are used under their respective licenses:
s5libs: Xenova/flan-t5-small — Apache 2.0 — AI text improvement model
terms.s5note: Full license texts are available in each library's respective repository. Use of these libraries does not imply endorsement by their creators or maintainers.
terms.s6: This service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that any data will be preserved. Since all data is stored in your browser's localStorage, clearing your browser data will permanently delete your resumes.
terms.s7: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the service operator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use this service, including loss of data, loss of employment opportunities, or any other losses.
terms.s8: You are responsible for the accuracy and truthfulness of all content in your resume. You agree not to use this service to create misleading, fraudulent, or illegal documents.
terms.s9: This service is provided from the United States. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of California, United States, without regard to conflict of law principles. If you are located in the European Union or European Economic Area, nothing in these terms affects your rights under the GDPR or other applicable local laws.
terms.s10: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s11: For questions about these terms, please visit www.wesleyramalho.com/contact.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1intro: MyPDFCV does not use cookies. Instead, we use your browser's localStorage to store:
s1items: Your resume data (content, section order, template choice)
Your theme preference (light or dark mode)
PostHog anonymous session data (random anonymous ID, event queue)
cookies.s1note: Your resume data never leaves your browser. Anonymous analytics data is sent to PostHog's servers (see section 2).
cookies.s2: We use PostHog to collect anonymous usage analytics such as feature usage, page visits, and general interaction patterns. No personally identifiable information (names, emails, resume content) is collected. All profiles are anonymous, your IP address is not stored, and we respect the Do Not Track (DNT) browser setting — if enabled, no analytics data is collected. You can also clear PostHog's localStorage data by clearing your browser's site data.
cookies.s3intro: The following third-party resources may be downloaded and cached by your browser during normal use of MyPDFCV:
s3items: AI models: The text improvement feature downloads an open-source AI model (Xenova/flan-t5-small) from Hugging Face's CDN on first use. This is cached by your browser using standard HTTP caching, not cookies.
PDF processing: The document import feature uses PDF.js (by Mozilla) which may load a worker script. This is also cached by standard browser caching.

LinkedIn OAuth: If you choose to sign in with LinkedIn, LinkedIn's own cookie and privacy policies apply to the authentication flow. We do not control LinkedIn's use of cookies. Please refer to LinkedIn's Cookie Policy for more information.

PostHog Analytics: Anonymous usage events are sent to PostHog (posthog.com) servers in the United States. PostHog's privacy policy applies to the processing of this data. No resume content or personal information is included.
cookies.s3note: These downloads and services are subject to the respective providers' privacy policies. No personal data from your resumes is sent to these providers.
cookies.s4: You can remove all stored data at any time by clearing your browser's localStorage. This will permanently delete all resume data and preferences. In most browsers, this can be done via Settings > Privacy > Clear browsing data > Cookies and site data.
cookies.s5: For questions about this policy, please visit www.wesleyramalho.com/contact.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.subtitle: Generate professional resume PDFs with AI assistants using the Model Context Protocol.
mcp.s1: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard that allows AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and others to use external tools. The @mypdfcv/mcp-server package lets any MCP-compatible AI assistant generate professional resume PDFs — no browser required.
mcp.s2intro: Add the MCP server to your AI assistant of choice:
mcp.s3intro: The MCP server provides 5 tools that AI assistants can use:
s3items: generate_resume_pdf — Generate a resume PDF from structured data. Supports all templates, languages, and custom section ordering. Saves to Downloads by default.
generate_resume_from_json — Power-user tool: pass a complete Resume JSON object with full control over template, sections, and ordering.
tailor_resume_for_job — Analyze a job description against your resume and get tailoring recommendations. Use before generating to optimize for a specific position.
list_templates — List all 7 available resume templates with their styles and descriptions.
list_locales — List all 7 supported languages for resume section headers.
mcp.s4: Choose from 7 professionally designed templates: Modern, Classic, Minimal, Executive, Bold, Balanced, and Clear. Each template has a unique style with different accent colors, layouts, and photo placements.
mcp.s5: Resume section headers can be generated in 7 languages: English, Portuguese (BR), Spanish, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, and German.
mcp.s6intro: Simply ask your AI assistant something like:
mcp.s6example: Generate a resume PDF for John Doe, a senior software engineer at Acme Corp since 2020, with skills in TypeScript and Python. Use the classic template in Portuguese.
mcp.s6example2: Here's a job posting for a Staff Engineer at Stripe. Tailor my resume for this position and generate a PDF with the modern template.
mcp.s7: The MCP server is published as @mypdfcv/mcp-server on npm. It uses @mypdfcv/pdf-core for PDF generation and @mypdfcv/i18n for translations. All packages are open source.
